flags.message: The snapshot is a bare bulk-scrape docket stub: no docket entries, no docket number, no dates, null cert-granted/cert-denied fields, with one linked opinion cluster. This is the profile of a pre-certiorari-era (mandatory jurisdiction) SCOTUS case, so a petition-disposition event does not map cleanly onto it — it looks like the population the predict scope's pre-1925 exclusion targets, but the docket's missing dates likely prevented the exclusion predicate from classifying it. Consider a recoverability probe or latching the scope exclusion for this docket.
